nasb.text: God made the two great lights, the greater light to govern the day, and the lesser light to govern the night; He made the stars also.

esv.text: And God made the two great lights—the greater light to rule the day and the lesser light to rule the night—and the stars.

cnv.text: 於是，　神造了兩個大光體，大的管晝，小的管夜；又造了星星。

ccb.text: 上帝造了两个大光体，较大的管白昼，较小的管黑夜，又造了星辰。

csbs.text: 神造了两个大光体：大的管昼，小的管夜，又造了星辰；
